guidances.note: Management reiterated/upfronted guidance of reaching 20% reported-level EBITDA margin by the end of the current fiscal (FY27) -- 'continues to expand in line with our guidance of 20% at reported level by end of the current fiscal.' FY26 actual reported EBITDA margin was 13.2%.

Enterprise and Data Center segment guided to scale up to 30% of revenue in FY27, upfronted from an earlier 12-18 month timeline per analyst Q&A -- 'we expect the Enterprise and Data Center segment to scale up to 30% of revenues in the current fiscal.' Segment was 19% of FY26 revenue (moderated due to a copper-business decline from higher LME prices). Value-cr field holds the percentage (30), not a rupee figure -- unit is % of revenue, not INR crore.

Approximately INR500cr capex planned, focused on technology leadership and upgrading the asset base to support high-value data center portfolio offerings -- 'we are looking at a capex of about INR 500 crores.'

FY26 order inflows more than doubled to INR7,687cr, +109% YoY vs INR3,672cr in FY25 -- a completed full-year outcome ('record order book intake'), driven by large-scale North America data-center projects and long-term Tier-1 India telecom orders.
